title: The Book of Formosa Font
title_zh: 福爾摩沙字體書籍設計
description: Inspired by Taiwan's diverse climate and terrain, this project transforms the idea of 'Formosa' into a typographic expression. By integrating Latin letterforms with native flora, we reinterpret the island's rich biodiversity through design.
description_zh: 靈感源自台灣多元的氣候與地形，本專案將「福爾摩沙」的概念轉化為字體語言。透過融合拉丁字母與台灣原生植物，以設計重新詮釋這座島嶼豐富的生物多樣性。

title: Patterned Glass — Notebook & Box Design
title_zh: 玻璃壓花 — 筆記本與盒裝設計
description: This project reinterprets the fading craft of patterned glass through a contemporary object. Combining a glass outer box, an exposed binding notebook, and an embossed bookmark, it preserves texture, memory, and the tactile quality of traditional craftsmanship.
description_zh: 本專案以當代物件重新詮釋逐漸凋零的玻璃壓花工藝。結合玻璃外盒、裸背裝訂筆記本與壓花書籤，保留傳統工藝的紋理、記憶與觸感。

title: Foucault — A Study in Knowledge & Order
title_zh: 傅柯 — 知識與秩序的探索
description: This editorial design reinterprets two seminal works by Michel Foucault—The Order of Things and The Archaeology of Knowledge. The project explores how systems of knowledge are constructed, organized, and transformed over time, translating abstract philosophical structures into a visual language of form, hierarchy, and material.
description_zh: 本裝幀設計重新詮釋米歇爾·傅柯的兩部重要著作——《詞與物》與《知識考古學》。探索知識系統如何被建構、組織與演變，將抽象的哲學結構轉化為形式、層次與材質的視覺語言。
